Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Squares between enriched profunctors

 Squares of profunctors are one of the ingredients needed to define the double (bi)category
 of (univalent) enriched categories, functors, and profunctors, and in this file, we define
 squares of enriched profunctors. We define squares using transformations between enriched
 profunctors, and we also give several standard operations for squares on profunctors.

 Contents
 1. Squares of enriched profunctors
 2. Accessors/builders for squares of enriched profunctors
 3. Squares and transformations
 4. Examples of squares of enriched profunctors
 4.1. Horizontal identity square
 4.2. Vertical identity square
 4.3. Horizontal composition of squares
 4.4. Up whiskering
 4.5. Down whiskering
 4.6. Left whiskering
 4.7. Right whiskering
 4.8. Companion pairs
 4.9. Conjoints

 ******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enriched.Enriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enriched.EnrichmentEquiv.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.Tensor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Bifunctors.CurriedBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Bifunctors.CurriedTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Bifunctors.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Bifunctors.WhiskeredTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

(** * 1. Squares of enriched profunctors *)
Definition enriched_profunctor_square
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂' : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {G : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {E₁' : enrichment C₁' V}
           {E₂' : enrichment C₂' V}
           (EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂)
           (EG : functor_enrichment G E₁' E₂')
           (P : E₁ ↛e E₁')
           (Q : E₂ ↛e E₂')
  : UU
  := enriched_profunctor_transformation
       P
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q).

Identity Coercion enriched_profunctor_square_to_trans
  : enriched_profunctor_square >-> enriched_profunctor_transformation.

(** * 2. Accessors/builders for squares of enriched profunctors *)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ τ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ τ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· EG x₂ x₁
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (EG x₂ x₁
   #⊗ identity
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

  exact (enriched_profunctor_transformation_lmap_e τ x₁ x₂ y).
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ τ x y₁ · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ τ x y₁ · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ τ x y₁
· EF y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₁': enrichment C₁' V
E₂': enrichment C₂' V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₁'
EG: functor_enrichment G E₂ E₂'
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₁' E₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ τ x y₁
· (EF y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂

  exact (enriched_profunctor_transformation_rmap_e τ x y₁ y₂).
Qed.

(** * 3. Squares and transformations *)
Definition enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {P Q : E₁ ↛e E₂}
           (τ : enriched_profunctor_square
                  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
                  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
                  P Q)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P Q
  := λ x y, τ x y.

Arguments enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data {V C₁ C₂ E₁ E₂ P Q} τ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
     x₁ y · lmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
    x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
     x y₁ · rmap_e Q x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
    x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
     x₁ y · lmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
    x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y · lmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

    exact (enriched_profunctor_square_lmap_e τ x₁ x₂ y).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
     x y₁ · rmap_e Q x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ
    x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ τ x y₁ · rmap_e Q x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂

    exact (enriched_profunctor_square_rmap_e τ x y₁ y₂).
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P Q
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P Q
 exact (enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_data τ)
 exact (enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation_laws τ).
Defined.

Definition enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {P Q : E₁ ↛e E₂}
           (τ : enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor
         (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
         (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
         Q)
  := λ x y, τ x y.

Arguments enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data {V C₁ C₂ E₁ E₂ P Q} τ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) Q) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
    x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
     x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) Q) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
    x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) Q) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
    x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q x₁ y)
   · lmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y) = lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q x₁ y)
   · lmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y) = lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y · lmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y

    apply enriched_profunctor_transformation_lmap_e.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
     x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) Q) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ
    x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
x₁: C₂
x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ x₂
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q x₁ x₂)
   · rmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y) = rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₁ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
x₁: C₂
x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ x₂
· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊗ Q x₁ x₂)
   · rmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y) = rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₁ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
x₁: C₂
x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ x₂ · rmap_e Q x₁ x₂ y =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₁ y

    apply enriched_profunctor_transformation_rmap_e.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂) Q)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂) Q)
 exact (enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_data τ)
 exact (enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square_laws τ).
Defined.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
≃ enriched_profunctor_square
    (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
    (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
≃ enriched_profunctor_square
    (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
    (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
→ enriched_profunctor_square
    (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
    (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
→ enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x : enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q,
?g (?f x) = x
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏
y : enriched_profunctor_square
      (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
      (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q, ?f (?g y) = y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
→ enriched_profunctor_square
    (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
    (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
 exact enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q
→ enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q
 exact enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x : enriched_profunctor_transformation P Q,
enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation
  (enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square x) = x
 abstract
      (intro τ ;
       use eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation ;
       intros x y ;
       apply idpath).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P, Q: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏
y : enriched_profunctor_square
      (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
      (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P Q,
enriched_profunctor_transformation_to_square
  (enriched_profunctor_square_to_transformation y) = y
 abstract
      (intro τ ;
       use eq_enriched_profunctor_transformation ;
       intros x y ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.

Section SquareToTransformation.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          {EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂}
          {EG : functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂}
          (τ : enriched_profunctor_square
                 EF EG
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)).

  Definition square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data
    : nat_trans_data G F
    := λ x, enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x).

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
nat_trans_enrichment square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data
  EG EF

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
nat_trans_enrichment square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data
  EG EF

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
∏ x y : C₁,
EF x y
· precomp_arr E₂ (F y)
    (square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data x) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₂ (G x)
    (square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· precomp_arr E₂ (F y)
    (square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data x) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₂ (G x)
    (square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· precomp_arr E₂ (F y)
    (enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)) =
EG x y
· postcomp_arr E₂ (G x)
    (enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂
          (enriched_to_arr E₂
             (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x))
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y)) =
EG x y
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂
       (enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y))
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y
· (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
     #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y)) =
EG x y
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) =
EG x y · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) =
EG x y · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
?b =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · τ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
· EF x y #⊗ τ x x · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
· (EF x y #⊗ τ x x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
EF x y #⊗ τ x x · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (F x) (F y) =
?t2

      exact (enriched_profunctor_square_rmap_e τ x x y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x x y
      · τ x y)) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x x y · τ x y)) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x x y · τ x y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
?b =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x x y · τ x y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
   · ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· ((enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂

τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x y
· (enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
(enriched_id E₁ y · τ y y) #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ y y #⊗ EG x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_profunctor_square_lmap_e τ y x y: EG x y #⊗ τ y y
· lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) (G y)
    (G x) (F y) =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) y x y
· τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_profunctor_square_lmap_e τ y x y: EG x y #⊗ τ y y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ G y, F y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: EG x y #⊗ τ y y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ G y, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
         E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
   sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · z) p: (λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
       E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
 sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · z)
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · τ y y #⊗ EG x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) =
(λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
       E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
 sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · z)
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄),
         E₂ ⦃ G x, F y ⦄ ⟧,
   sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · z) p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · τ y y #⊗ EG x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: identity ((E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
q: τ y y #⊗ EG x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y
τ y y #⊗ EG x y · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (F y) =
?t2

      exact q.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x x y · τ x y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · τ x y =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
· enriched_comp E₁ x x y · τ x y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
· enriched_comp E₁ x x y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · enriched_comp E₁ x x y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · enriched_comp E₁ x x y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
x, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) = identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
G ⟹ F

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
G ⟹ F

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
nat_trans_data G F
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
is_nat_trans G F ?t

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
nat_trans_data G F
 exact square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
is_nat_trans G F square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data
 exact (is_nat_trans_from_enrichment square_to_enriched_nat_trans_enrichment).
  Defined.
End SquareToTransformation.

Arguments square_to_enriched_nat_trans_data {V C₁ C₂ F G E₁ E₂ EF EG} τ /.

(** * 4. Examples of squares of enriched profunctors *)

(** ** 4.1. Horizontal identity square *)
Definition id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : E₁ ↛e E₂)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor
         (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
         (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
         P)
  := λ _ _, identity _.

Arguments id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data {V C₁ C₂ E₁ E₂} P /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · identity (P x₂ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · identity (P x₂ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y = lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
   · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · identity (P x y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P x y₁)
· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P x y₁)
   · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · identity (P x y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ = rmap_e P x y₁ y₂

    apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P P


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P P

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P)
 exact (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data P)
 exact (id_h_enriched_profunctor_square_laws P).
Defined.

(** ** 4.2. Vertical identity square *)
Definition id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor
         EF EF
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
  := λ x y, EF x y.

Arguments id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data {V C₁ C₂ F E₁ E₂} EF /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x₁ x₂ y
· id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x y₁ y₂
· id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x₁ x₂ y
· id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· (EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ EF x₁ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y))

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x y₁ y₂
· id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

    apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square EF EF
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square EF EF
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EF
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EF
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
 exact (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_data EF)
 exact (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square_laws EF).
Defined.

(** ** 4.3. Horizontal composition of squares *)
Definition comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ C₁' C₂' C₃' : category}
           {F₁ : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {F₂ : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
           {G₁ : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
           {G₂ : C₂' ⟶ C₃'}
           {EC₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {EC₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {EC₃ : enrichment C₃ V}
           {EC₁' : enrichment C₁' V}
           {EC₂' : enrichment C₂' V}
           {EC₃' : enrichment C₃' V}
           {EF₁ : functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂}
           {EF₂ : functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃}
           {EG₁ : functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'}
           {EG₂ : functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'}
           {P₁ : EC₁ ↛e EC₁'}
           {P₂ : EC₂ ↛e EC₂'}
           {P₃ : EC₃ ↛e EC₃'}
           (τ : enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂)
           (θ : enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P₁
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor
         (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)
         (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂)
         P₃)
  := λ x y, τ x y · θ _ _.

Arguments comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data
  {V C₁ C₂ C₃ C₁' C₂' C₃'
   F₁ F₂ G₁ G₂
   EC₁ EC₂ EC₃ EC₁' EC₂' EC₃'
   EF₁ EF₂ EG₁ EG₂
   P₁ P₂ P₃}
  τ θ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)
       (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) P₃) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y
· comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)
       (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) P₃) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂
· comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)
       (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) P₃) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y
· comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (τ x₁ y · θ (G₁ x₁) (F₁ y))
· ((EG₁ x₂ x₁ · EG₂ (G₁ x₂) (G₁ x₁))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y)))
   · lmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (G₂ (G₁ x₂)) (F₂ (F₁ y))) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (τ x₁ y · θ (G₁ x₁) (F₁ y))
· (EG₁ x₂ x₁ · EG₂ (G₁ x₂) (G₁ x₁))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y)))
· lmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (G₂ (G₁ x₂)) (F₂ (F₁ y)) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(EG₁ x₂ x₁ · EG₂ (G₁ x₂) (G₁ x₁))
#⊗ (τ x₁ y · θ (G₁ x₁) (F₁ y))
· lmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (G₂ (G₁ x₂)) (F₂ (F₁ y)) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG₁ x₂ x₁ #⊗ τ x₁ y
· EG₂ (G₁ x₂) (G₁ x₁) #⊗ θ (G₁ x₁) (F₁ y)
· lmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (G₂ (G₁ x₂)) (F₂ (F₁ y)) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG₁ x₂ x₁ #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (EG₂ (G₁ x₂) (G₁ x₁) #⊗ θ (G₁ x₁) (F₁ y)
   · lmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x₁)) (G₂ (G₁ x₂)) (F₂ (F₁ y))) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG₁ x₂ x₁ #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (lmap_e P₂ (G₁ x₁) (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y) · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG₁ x₂ x₁ #⊗ τ x₁ y · lmap_e P₂ (G₁ x₁) (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)
· θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y) =
lmap_e P₁ x₁ x₂ y · τ x₂ y · θ (G₁ x₂) (F₁ y)

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)
       (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) P₃) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂
· comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (τ x y₁ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁))
· ((EF₁ y₁ y₂ · EF₂ (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂))
   #⊗ identity (P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)))
   · rmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y₂))) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · (τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂))

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (τ x y₁ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁))
· (EF₁ y₁ y₂ · EF₂ (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂))
  #⊗ identity (P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)))
· rmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y₂)) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂)

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃

y₁, y₂: C₁
(EF₁ y₁ y₂ · EF₂ (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂))
#⊗ (τ x y₁ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁))
· rmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y₂)) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃

y₁, y₂: C₁
EF₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ τ x y₁
· EF₂ (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂) #⊗ θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁)
· rmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y₂)) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'

P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ τ x y₁
· (EF₂ (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂) #⊗ θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁)
   · rmap_e P₃ (G₂ (G₁ x)) (F₂ (F₁ y₁)) (F₂ (F₁ y₂))) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · (τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'

P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ τ x y₁
· (rmap_e P₂ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂) · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂)) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · (τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category

F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'

P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃

y₁, y₂: C₁
EF₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ τ x y₁ · rmap_e P₂ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₁) (F₁ y₂)
· θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂)

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃

y₁, y₂: C₁
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂) =
rmap_e P₁ x y₁ y₂ · τ x y₂ · θ (G₁ x) (F₁ y₂)

    apply idpath.
Qed.

  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category

F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃

  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_comp_enrichment EF₁ EF₂)
     (functor_comp_enrichment EG₁ EG₂) P₃)
 exact (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₁', C₂', C₃': category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
G₂: C₂' ⟶ C₃'
