EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₃: enrichment C₃ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
EC₃': enrichment C₃' V
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ EC₁ EC₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ EC₂ EC₃
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ EC₁' EC₂'
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ EC₂' EC₃'
P₁: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
P₂: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
P₃: enriched_profunctor EC₃ EC₃'
τ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₁ P₁ P₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG₂ P₂ P₃
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)
 exact (comp_h_enriched_profunctor_square_laws τ θ).
Defined.

(** * 4.4. Up whiskering *)
Definition uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂' : category}
           {EC₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {EC₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {EC₁' : enrichment C₁' V}
           {EC₂' : enrichment C₂' V}
           {F F' : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {τ : F ⟹ F'}
           {EF : functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂}
           {EF' : functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂}
           {G : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
           {EG : functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'}
           {P : EC₁ ↛e EC₁'}
           {Q : EC₂ ↛e EC₂'}
           (Eτ : nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF')
           (θ : enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q)
  := λ x y,
     θ x y
     · mon_linvunitor _
     · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity _)
     · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y) (F' y).

Arguments uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
  {V
   C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂'
   EC₁ EC₂ EC₁' EC₂'
   F F'
   τ
   EF EF'
   G EG
   P Q}
  Eτ θ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q) x₁ x₂
    y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q) x y₁
    y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q) x₁ x₂
    y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
   · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
          #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
          · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
         · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
         · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
         · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· EG x₂ x₁
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

τ: F ⟹ F'

identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
          #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
          · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)))
   · (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F' y))
      · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y))) =
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (EG x₂ x₁
   #⊗ identity
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
   · (lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
      · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
         · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
            #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
            · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)))))

#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

?b =
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ identity (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ identity (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
· rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
          #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
          · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)) =
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ identity (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x₁ y)
· (lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
         · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y))))

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'

y: C₁
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
       · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₂) (F y))
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x₂) (F y))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)))

τ: F ⟹ F'

· (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
   · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
      #⊗ lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
      · rmap_e Q (G x₂) (F y) (F' y))) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
       · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)
      · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y))) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
       · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y))
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
  #⊗ identity ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y)))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F y) (F' y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F' y)

identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))

(sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y)) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· ((identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
       (EC₂ ⦃ F y, F' y ⦄) (Q (G x₁) (F y))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y)))) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · (mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
           (Q (G x₁) (F y))
         · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
               #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y)))))) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y)))

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q

y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
           (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
         · mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
             I_{ V} (Q (G x₁) (F y))))) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))

y: C₁

#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
           (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
         · mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
             I_{ V} (Q (G x₁) (F y))))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q

y: C₁
?b =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       (Q (G x₁) (F y))) =
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G x₁) (F y))

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁

#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G x₁) (F y)) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G x₁) (F y))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q) x y₁
    y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
    · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₁))
· (EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F' y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F' y₁) (F' y₂)) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
    · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₁))
· (EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F' y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F' y₁) (F' y₂)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

τ: F ⟹ F'

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

τ: F ⟹ F'

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF' y₁ y₂
#⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F' y₁) (F' y₂) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF' y₁ y₂
#⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₁)
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F' y₁) (F' y₂)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF' y₁ y₂
#⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
     (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁))
       · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))))
· (EF' y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂))) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ: F ⟹ F'

EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁))
       · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))))
· (EF' y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F' y₁ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

       · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)

EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
(identity (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
 #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
 · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁)))
· (EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · ((identity (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
          · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
         · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)))) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁)))
· (EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · ((identity (EC₂ ⦃ F' y₁, F' y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
          · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
         · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

· (EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G x) (F y₁))

· identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · ((EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
       · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G x) (F y₁))

mon_rinvunitor (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· EF' y₁ y₂ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₁)
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F' y₁) (F' y₂) = ?y'

      exact (Eτ y₁ y₂).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· ((mon_linvunitor (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂) #⊗ EF y₁ y₂
    · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· (mon_linvunitor (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂) #⊗ EF y₁ y₂
   · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · θ x y₂
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

τ: F ⟹ F'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· (mon_linvunitor (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂) #⊗ EF y₁ y₂
   · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ θ x y₁ · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

· (mon_linvunitor (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂) #⊗ EF y₁ y₂
   · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)

· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

     #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ θ x y₁ · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ θ x y₁
· ((mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · (enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂))) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ θ x y₁
· (rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
         · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)) =
rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) =
rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) =
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)) =

  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)))

mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

      #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₂))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂))) = ?b

?b =
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))

· (enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

τ: F ⟹ F'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
#⊗ identity
     ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
#⊗ identity
     ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₂) (F' y₂) = ?t2

      apply (rmap_e_rmap_e Q).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
         ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂))) =
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
        ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂) =
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F' y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
        ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁)) =
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂

P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
        ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁)) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· enriched_comp EC₂ (F y₁) (F y₂) (F' y₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)

    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁)) =

#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
  #⊗ (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity
           (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁)) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity
            (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁))
   · mon_rassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₂, F' y₂ ⦄)
       (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G x) (F y₁))) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
     #⊗ identity
          (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂ (τ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
   · mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁)
· identity
    (I_{ V} ⊗ (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q x y₁) =
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))

    apply id_right.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_square EF' EG P Q


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_square EF' EG P Q

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF' EG Q)
 exact (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
EF': functor_enrichment F' EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EF'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ)
 exact (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_laws Eτ θ).
Defined.

(** * 4.5. Down whiskering *)
Definition dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂' : category}
           {EC₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {EC₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {EC₁' : enrichment C₁' V}
           {EC₂' : enrichment C₂' V}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {EF : functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂}
           {G G' : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
           {τ : G ⟹ G'}
           {EG : functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'}
           {EG' : functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'}
           {P : EC₁ ↛e EC₁'}
           {Q : EC₂ ↛e EC₂'}
           (Eτ : nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG')
           (θ : enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q)
  := λ x y,
     θ x y
     · mon_linvunitor _
     · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x) #⊗ identity _)
     · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y).

Arguments dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
  {V
   C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂'
   EC₁ EC₂ EC₁' EC₂'
   F EF
   G G'
   τ
   EG EG'
   P Q}
  Eτ θ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ)

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
    · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₁) (F y))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
    · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₁) (F y))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)

· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₁) (F y)

y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₁) (F y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ identity ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₁) (F y)
· lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ identity ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₁) (F y)
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ identity ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
       (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
       · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))))
· (EG x₂ x₁
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

τ: G ⟹ G'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
       · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))))
· (EG x₂ x₁
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
       · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))))
· (EG x₂ x₁
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· EG x₂ x₁
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· EG x₂ x₁
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
   · (EG x₂ x₁
      #⊗ identity
           ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
           (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
              (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
            · (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁)
                 (G' x₁) #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
               · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))))) =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (EG x₂ x₁
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
           (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
            · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))))) = 
?t2

  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'

EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)

         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

            #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
            · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))))) = 
?t2

τ: G ⟹ G'
