Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· ((identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
     (EC₂' ⦃ G x₁, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
            I_{ V}
          · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
            I_{ V}
          · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
            I_{ V}
          · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?b

· (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}

         #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)

y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ (identity I_{ V} #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
         #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)

      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁
#⊗ (identity I_{ V} #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
     #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity I_{ V})
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
     #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· ((EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity I_{ V})
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
          #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?t2

(EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}

       #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)

   #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
 · identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
 · (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
       #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
      #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))) =
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁)
  #⊗ identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
          · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
             · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁)
                 (G' x₁)))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?b

y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· mon_lassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q

y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_lassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
          · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
             · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁)
                 (G' x₁)))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_lassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
          · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
             · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁)
                 (G' x₁)))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_lassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
          · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
             · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁)
                 (G' x₁)))
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
          · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?t20

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t20

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity
  ((EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V} ⊗ Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t20

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
 · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t20

        apply idpath.

· ((sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
    · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁))

 · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
    · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ: G ⟹ G'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q

y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₁) #⊗ EG x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G x₁) (G' x₁) = ?y'

      exact (!(Eτ x₂ x₁)).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· ((mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
    · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· (θ x₂ y · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)

· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· ((mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)) = ?y'

 · EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)) = ?y'0

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂) = ?y'0

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG' x₂ x₁ · mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂) = ?y'0

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(EG' x₂ x₁ · mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)) #⊗ θ x₁ y = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(EG' x₂ x₁
 · (mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
    · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))) #⊗ θ x₁ y =
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· ((mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
    · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) =
EG' x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q

(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))) =
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₂) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))

   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
#⊗ identity
     ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G' x₂) (F y)
· lmap_e Q (G' x₂) (G x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      apply (lmap_e_lmap_e Q).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
         ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) =
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity
       ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
        ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
(mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· enriched_comp EC₂' (G x₂) (G' x₂) (G' x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q (G' x₁) (G x₂) (F y)

y: C₁

  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ identity

· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)

 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))

· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)

· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
  #⊗ (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity
           (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   #⊗ (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity
            (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂)
   #⊗ (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity
            (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
        (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄) (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G' x₂ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

#⊗ identity

x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
        (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity
           (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
      · (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
        #⊗ identity
             (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁
                y))) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

mon_linvunitor

   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)

       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x₂))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
      · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
          (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity
             (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁
                y))) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'

x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity
          (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)) =
?t2

identity
  (I_{ V} ⊗ (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)

sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) = 
?t2

      apply idpath.

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
(mon_linvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x₁ y) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂' ⦃ G' x₂, G' x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x₁) (F y))

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂ · mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
   · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
   · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x y₁
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
          #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
          · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))))
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)))
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
   · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· (θ x y₂
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
      · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
         · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))
· EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ · θ x y₂
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))
· EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ θ x y₁ · rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))
· EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· EF y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'

y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· (identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
       · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
          #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
          · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)))
   · (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G x) (F y₁))
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂))) =
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ θ x y₁
· (EF y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x y₁)
   · (rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
      · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
         · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
            #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
            · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)))))

    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
EF y₁ y₂
#⊗ identity
     (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG' Q x y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)

    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q

y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) = ?b

      apply idpath.

identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =

· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)))

rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)

identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)

       · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂) = ?b

Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'

y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
   · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂))) = ?b

   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₂))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
#⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
· lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
#⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
   #⊗ rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
   · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
      #⊗ rmap_e Q (G' x) (F y₁) (F y₂)
      · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₂))) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
       · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
          (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)
      · rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂))) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
       · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁))
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G' x) (G x) (F y₁)
· rmap_e Q (G x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
  #⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)

· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))

   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)

G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
   #⊗ identity
        ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
           (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
         · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
             (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))))) =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
#⊗ identity ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
     (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))) =
?t2

EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
#⊗ (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))
· (mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
     (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
        (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
          (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
#⊗ (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))
· mon_rassociator (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄)
    (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) = ?t2

mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (EC₂' ⦃ G x, G' x ⦄) (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) = ?t2

   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

EC₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ: G ⟹ G'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
