#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · (mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
           (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
         · identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
               #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))))) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
    · enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))

  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · (mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
           (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)

  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))

· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr EC₂' (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))

τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor
  ((EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
        (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
           (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
         · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
             (Q (G' x) (F y₁))))) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'

mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
     (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)

      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}

         #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
         · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
             (Q (G' x) (F y₁))))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

?b =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

  (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)

   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)

      · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
          (Q (G' x) (F y₁)))) = ?t2

identity
  (I_{ V} ⊗ (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

τ: G ⟹ G'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.

mon_linvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
   · mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
       (Q (G' x) (F y₁))) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) =
identity (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
x: C₁'
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁)) =
mon_rinvunitor (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G' x) (F y₁))
· mon_lassociator (EC₂ ⦃ F y₁, F y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (Q (G' x) (F y₁))

    apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

τ: G ⟹ G'

EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q)
 exact (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G, G': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
τ: G ⟹ G'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
EG': functor_enrichment G' EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG EG'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG' P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data Eτ θ)
 exact (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_laws Eτ θ).
Defined.

(** * 4.6. Left whiskering *)
Definition lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂' : category}
           {EC₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {EC₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {EC₁' : enrichment C₁' V}
           {EC₂' : enrichment C₂' V}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {EF : functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂}
           {G : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
           {EG : functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'}
           {P P' : EC₁ ↛e EC₁'}
           (τ : enriched_profunctor_transformation P P')
           {Q : EC₂ ↛e EC₂'}
           (θ : enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q)
  := λ x y, τ x y · θ x y.

Arguments lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
  {V
   C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂'
   EC₁ EC₂ EC₁' EC₂'
   F EF
   G EG
   P P'}
  τ
  {Q}
  θ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (τ x₁ y · θ x₁ y)
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ x₂ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ x₂ y)

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
   · (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ x₂ y)

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'

· (identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ y
   · (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F y))
      · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
?b = lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ x₂ y)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
lmap_e P' x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ y
· (lmap_e P' x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₂ y · θ x₂ y)

· (EF x₂ y #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F x₂))

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
?b = rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₁ y · θ x₁ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ x₂
· (identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ x₂
   · (EF x₂ y #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F x₂))
      · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ x₂
· (EF x₂ y #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F x₂))
   · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ θ x₁ x₂
· EF x₂ y #⊗ identity (Q (G x₁) (F x₂))
· rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ y #⊗ θ x₁ x₂ · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
rmap_e P' x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ x₂
· (rmap_e P' x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (τ x₁ y · θ x₁ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) #⊗ τ x₁ x₂
· rmap_e P' x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₁ y · θ x₁ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₁ y · θ x₁ y =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · τ x₁ y · θ x₁ y

    apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'

Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q)
 exact (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P, P': enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P P'
Q: enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P' Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)
 exact (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_laws τ θ).
Defined.

(** * 4.7. Right whiskering *)
Definition rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂' : category}
           {EC₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {EC₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {EC₁' : enrichment C₁' V}
           {EC₂' : enrichment C₂' V}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {EF : functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂}
           {G : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
           {EG : functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'}
           {P : EC₁ ↛e EC₁'}
           {Q Q' : EC₂ ↛e EC₂'}
           (τ : enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q')
           (θ : enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q)
  : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
      P
      (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q')
  := λ x y, θ x y · τ (G x) (F y).

Arguments rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data
  {V
   C₁ C₂ C₁' C₂'
   EC₁ EC₂ EC₁' EC₂'
   F EF
   G EG
   P Q Q'}
  τ
  θ /.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q') x₁ x₂
    y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q') x y₁
    y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁') (y : C₁),
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₁ y
· lmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q') x₁ x₂
    y =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y))
· (EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q' (G x₁) (F y))
   · lmap_e Q' (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
identity (EC₁' ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y))
· EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q' (G x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q' (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ (θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y))
· lmap_e Q' (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ (G x₁) (F y)
· lmap_e Q' (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (identity (EC₂' ⦃ G x₂, G x₁ ⦄) #⊗ τ (G x₁) (F y)
   · lmap_e Q' (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y
· (lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y) · τ (G x₂) (F y)) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
EG x₂ x₁ #⊗ θ x₁ y · lmap_e Q (G x₁) (G x₂) (F y)
· τ (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁, x₂: C₁'
y: C₁
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y) =
lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₂ y · τ (G x₂) (F y)

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
∏ (x : C₁') (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (EC₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₁
· rmap_e (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q') x y₁
    y₂ =
rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ x₂ · τ (G x₁) (F x₂))
· (EF x₂ y #⊗ identity (Q' (G x₁) (F x₂))
   · rmap_e Q' (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y)) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
identity (EC₁ ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
#⊗ (θ x₁ x₂ · τ (G x₁) (F x₂))
· EF x₂ y #⊗ identity (Q' (G x₁) (F x₂))
· rmap_e Q' (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ y #⊗ (θ x₁ x₂ · τ (G x₁) (F x₂))
· rmap_e Q' (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ y #⊗ θ x₁ x₂
· identity (EC₂ ⦃ F x₂, F y ⦄) #⊗ τ (G x₁) (F x₂)
· rmap_e Q' (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ y #⊗ θ x₁ x₂
· (identity (EC₂ ⦃ F x₂, F y ⦄) #⊗ τ (G x₁) (F x₂)
   · rmap_e Q' (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y)) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ y #⊗ θ x₁ x₂
· (rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y) · τ (G x₁) (F y)) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · (θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ y #⊗ θ x₁ x₂ · rmap_e Q (G x₁) (F x₂) (F y)
· τ (G x₁) (F y) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V

EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'
P: enriched_profunctor EC₁ EC₁'
Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
x₁: C₁'
x₂, y: C₁
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y) =
rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y · θ x₁ y · τ (G x₁) (F y)

    apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EC₂: enrichment C₂ V

enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q'

  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q')

enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'

Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data P
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF EG Q')
 exact (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ).
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
EC₁: enrichment C₁ V
EC₂: enrichment C₂ V
EC₁': enrichment C₁' V
EC₂': enrichment C₂' V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F EC₁ EC₂
G: C₁' ⟶ C₂'
EG: functor_enrichment G EC₁' EC₂'

Q, Q': enriched_profunctor EC₂ EC₂'
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q Q'
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P Q
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_data τ θ)
 exact (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square_laws τ θ).
Defined.

Section CompanionsAndConjoints.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          (EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂).

  (** ** 4.8. Companion pairs *)
  Definition representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
        (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor
           EF
           (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
    := λ x y, identity _.

  Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data /.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x₁
     y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF) x₁
  x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x₂
    y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x
     y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF) x
  y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x
    y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x₁
     y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF) x₁
  x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x₂
    y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄))
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ (F y)

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x
     y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF) x
  y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data x
    y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄))
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x (F y₁) (F y₂)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square EF
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square EF
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data
 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_laws.
  Defined.

  Definition representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor
           (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
           (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF))
    := λ x y, EF x y.

  Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data /.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)) x₁
    x₂ y =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x₁ x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
    x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
     x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data x
    y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)) x₁
    x₂ y =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x₁ x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
    x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· (EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ EF x₁ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
     x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data x
    y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
   · (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂))) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄))
   · (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂))) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  EF (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)

enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  EF (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF)

enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
     (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₁) EF
     (representable_enriched_profunctor_left EF))
 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data
 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_laws.
  Defined.

  (** ** 4.9. Conjoints *)
  Definition representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor
           EF (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
           (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF))
    := λ x y, EF x y.

  Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data /.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF))
    x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x₁ x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data x₂
    y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data x
     y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data x
    y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF))
    x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x₁ x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data x₂
    y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ EF x₁ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· EF x₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (EF x₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)) =
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₁ y · EF x₂ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: C₁
EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y) =
EF x₁ y #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) (F y)

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : C₁,
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data x
     y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF
       (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
       (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data x
    y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· (EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂)) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ EF x y₁
· EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
enriched_comp E₁ x y₁ y₂ · EF x y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: C₁
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂) =
EF y₁ y₂ #⊗ EF x y₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y₁) (F y₂)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square EF
  (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)

  (precomp_enriched_profunctor EF

 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data
 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_laws.
  Defined.

  Definition representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
        (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor
           (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
    := λ x y, identity _.

  Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data /.

  representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data

  representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (y : C₂),
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF) x₁
  x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
    x₂ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₁) (y₁ y₂ : C₂),
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
     x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF) x
  y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
    x y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (y : C₂),
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
     x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF) x₁
  x₂ y
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
    x₂ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· (EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄))
· (EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
EF x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x₂, F x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ EF x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x₂) (F x₁) y

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₁) (y₁ y₂ : C₂),
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
     x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF) x
  y₁ y₂
· representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
    x y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, y₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) y₁ y₂) =
enriched_comp E₂ (F x) y₁ y₂
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, y₁ ⦄))
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, y₁ ⦄))
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) y₁ y₂) =
enriched_comp E₂ (F x) y₁ y₂
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ (F x) y₁ y₂ =
enriched_comp E₂ (F x) y₁ y₂

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  EF (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)

enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

C₁, C₂: category

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (representable_enriched_profunctor_right EF)
  (precomp_enriched_profunctor
     (functor_id_enrichment E₂) EF

 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data
 exact representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_laws.
  Defined.
End CompanionsAndConjoints.

Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_left_unit_data {V C₁ C₂ F E₁ E₂} EF /.
Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_left_counit_data {V C₁ C₂ F E₁ E₂} EF /.
Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_right_unit_data {V C₁ C₂ F E₁ E₂} EF /.
Arguments representable_enriched_profunctor_right_counit_data {V C₁ C₂ F E₁ E₂} EF /.
